name: unify-models-cleanup
title: Unify on models package: remove legacy provider conversion functions and dead code
description: Clean up the parallel legacy data conversion paths in providers/modprovider.go. The models package is now the single source of truth (structs alias to it, database consumes it directly, bridge.go already deleted). Remove the dead 'old path' conversion functions (modToSearchResult, fileToProjectVersionResult, versionToProjectVersionResult, dependenciesFromVersion, dependenciesFromFile) and keep only the new 'ModProject/ModVersion' conversion functions (modToModProject, fileToModVersion, versionToModVersion, etc.). Wire the new functions into the active Search/ListVersions flow so ProjectID and other fields are populated correctly. Remove dead code and verify build + tests stay green.
creator: link-fgfgui
